# Support

If you need help, please use one of the following channels:

## Quick Questions & Discussions
Join our Discord:
https://discord.gg/tDUBDCYw9Q

## Bug Reports
Open a GitHub issue:
https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck/issues

## Feature Requests
Create a discussion or issue with detailed context:
https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck/issues

## Translations
Create a discussion or issue with detailed context:
https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck/issues

## Donations

Even small contributions make a big difference.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/itsfatduck)

Please do not use issues for general support questions.
Learn more about how to support optimizerDuck at:
https://optimizerduck.vercel.app/docs/contribute/overview
